_meta.description: Canonical one-phenocode-per-disease mapping for Genebass LoF burden.
_meta.selection_rule: Best-powered phenotype per disease, chosen by scientific relevance and expected case count. NEVER selected by p-value.
_meta.notes: Must be frozen (SHA-256 hashed) before any classification step.

Alzheimers disease.rationale: Primary Alzheimer's phenotype; custom2 likely stricter definition with fewer cases

Anorexia nervosa.rationale: No matching phenotype in Genebass. Psychiatric eating disorder with very low UKB prevalence. Structural missingness.

Autism spectrum disorder.rationale: No matching phenotype in Genebass. Adult cohort underascertains childhood-diagnosed ASD. Structural missingness.

Chronic kidney disease.rationale: UKB field 30700 = serum creatinine, the standard substrate for eGFR and CKD staging. Continuous biomarker is better-powered than binary ICD code for LoF burden testing. Higher creatinine (positive beta) = impaired renal function = disease risk.

Crohns disease.rationale: Purpose-built Crohn's phenotype, likely higher case count than ICD K50 subcode 41210|K508

Glioma.rationale: ICD-10 C71 = brain cancer, broadest glioma definition. Custom 41200/41210 codes are histological subtypes with fewer cases.

Inflammatory bowel disease.rationale: Composite IBD phenotype, likely largest case count. IBD_custom2 is alternative definition.

Juvenile idiopathic arthritis.rationale: Pediatric disease absent from adult UKB exome cohort. Structural missingness.

Lung cancer.rationale: Purpose-built lung cancer phenotype, likely higher N than ICD C34. FH_Lung_cancer is family history, not case status.

Major depressive disorder.rationale: Purpose-built depression phenotype with highest expected N. FH_ is family history. ICD F32x subcodes have fewer cases.

Multiple sclerosis.rationale: Full-name phenotype. MS_custom also exists but may be less specific.

Myocardial infarction.rationale: CAD is the broader phenotype encompassing MI. Highest case count. HCadjBMI/WCadjBMI are anthropometric traits (false positive from substring matching), excluded.

Neuroblastoma.rationale: Pediatric cancer absent from adult UKB exome cohort. Structural missingness.

Pancreatic cancer.rationale: ICD-10 C25 = pancreatic cancer, broadest definition. 41200 subcodes (C253, C254) are histological subtypes.

Parkinsons disease.rationale: Purpose-built Parkinson's phenotype. FH_ is family history, excluded.

Schizophrenia.rationale: Purpose-built phenotype with higher expected N than ICD F20 subcode

Systemic lupus erythematosus.rationale: Purpose-built lupus phenotype. SLE_custom also exists. sleep_duration was a false positive from 'sle' substring matching, excluded.

Thyroid cancer.rationale: ICD-10 C73 = thyroid cancer. Thyroid_custom may include non-cancer thyroid conditions, so ICD-10 is more specific.

Ulcerative colitis.rationale: Purpose-built UC phenotype, highest expected N. ICD K51 subcodes have fewer cases.
